basics.name: Ali Sadikin
basics.label: AI-Era Agency Engineer
basics.summary: Short one-paragraph bio (used as fallback when no variant_summary applies).

summary_variants.vibe_coding: Senior engineer who ships agency-grade AI products in days, not months. Claude Code + Next.js 15 + FastAPI; four production launches in 2025.
summary_variants.ai_automation: Builder of LLM-powered pipelines that replace manual ops. Claude CLI, MCP servers, n8n; shipped 6 internal agents now saving 40h/week.
summary_variants.ai_video: End-to-end AI video pipeline architect: Runway + Veo + Nano Banana. From brief to final cut in 48h for brand + agency clients.

work.summary: Led a 4-person team building agency-grade AI automation tools.

highlights.text: Shipped 6 production Claude Code plugins used by 200+ daily users across 3 agencies.
Built a Veo + Runway pipeline producing 40 branded videos/month at <$2/clip.
